meaning: n.准直望远镜,自准直望远镜,具标度尺的望远镜
examples: The system is composed of an optical autocollimator, a CCD and image collector board etc.
The principle, structure and assembling method of 0 ". 2 micrometric autocollimator and its two main accessories are introduced in the paper."
Autocollimator includes optical autocollimator and photoelectric autocollimator. The latter is the combination of optical autocollimator and photo-electricity technique.
